prompt_text:
### Demographics: 37-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Detemir 20units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 73.9 kg; Height 173.7 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.2%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.7%), FPG (12 months ago 301mg/dL; 9 months ago 309mg/dL; 6 months ago 320mg/dL; 3 months ago 244mg/dL; current 236mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.2kg; 9 months ago 72.7kg; 6 months ago 70.9kg; 3 months ago 68.8kg; current 73.9kg), Height (12 months ago 173.7cm; 9 months ago 173.7cm; 6 months ago 173.7cm; 3 months ago 173.7cm; current 173.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 64mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 80mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 83mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 84mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; current 81mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 89mg/g; 9 months ago 92mg/g; 6 months ago 85mg/g; 3 months ago 86mg/g; current 74mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 114mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 117mg/dL; 3 months ago 117mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
